name: Heavenly Bananas 9
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Slice the bananas lengthwise.
3. Saute the bananas quickly over high heat until just tender.
4. Place half of the sauted bananas in a greased 8 x 8-inch dish.
5. In a bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, and cinnamon.
6. Spread half of this mixture over the bananas in the dish.
7. Top with the remaining banana slices.
8. Spread the remaining cream cheese mixture evenly over the top.
9. Pour the heavy cream over the dessert.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
11. Serve warm or cool, garnished with whipped cream if desired.
